name: mycash-plan
description: MyCash Plan Android packaging with Capacitor for the existing static PWA.

scripts.test: node tests/i18n-guard-smoke.js && node tests/i18n-professional-smoke.js && node tests/upcoming-language-smoke.js && node tests/budget-alert-smoke.js && node tests/latest-merge-smoke.js
scripts.android:add: npm run android:prepare && npx cap add android
scripts.android:sync: npm run android:prepare && npx cap sync android
scripts.android:open: npm run android:sync && npx cap open android
